# Q6 string count of dots and equals (regex log extraction)

**Dataset**: `gx_09_logs` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Regex extraction from free-text log fields with regextract. Q6 string count of dots and equals.

```sql
dataset = gx_09_logs | alter dots = string_count(line, "."), eqs = string_count(line, "=") | fields line, dots, eqs | sort desc eqs
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 14). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
